title: Lift-3 Fold: Gauge, Color, And Face-Transport Normal Forms
dimensional_role: order-4 slot-3: fold the initial action into a higher-dimensional representation
proof_form_required: fold map, coordinate atlas, and representation transport
formal_target: represent gauge/color language as a fold of LCR face transport, with all physical identity claims citation/calibration-bound
semantic_target: after the supervisor cursor and residual slot 32, the next missing move is a representation fold: the corpus needs a chart that can hold gauge/color translations without pretending translation is measurement
analog_target: a face atlas: the same state can be read through different faces, but every face label must point back to the same indexed source object
